name: GOLFTEC Louisville
about: GOLFTEC Louisville is a technology-driven golf training center offering lessons, club fitting, and practice bays. The facility utilizes advanced technologies including OPTIMOTION swing analysis, high-speed video, and launch monitors to provide data-driven coaching. Services include private lessons, club fitting with certified fitters, and practice memberships for access to training bays. Pricing is based on lesson packages, club fitting starting at $95, and the facility offers a 10% discount on pro shop merchandise.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and OPTIMOTION technology
Professional PGA coaches with personalized lesson plans
On-site club fitting services with major brands and shaft optimization
Pro shop with 10% discount on retail prices
Convenient online booking system for lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides rental clubs and a pro shop where you can purchase equipment if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of an on-site kitchen or food service. It's recommended to confirm their policy on outside food and drinks when booking your session.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice, not simulated play. Sessions are structured around skill development rather than complete rounds of golf.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth golfers, with technology and coaching tailored for younger players learning the game.
